rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: time-limited platforming with escalating enemy variety; US version intensified via reduced timer (3:00 vs 5:00 JP)

difficulty_curve.early_game: simple platforming with basic movement enemies
difficulty_curve.mid_game: environmental hazard introduction with mixed enemy types
difficulty_curve.late_game: aquatic and aerial enemy encounters with increased spatial complexity
notable_spikes: boss fight with Rufus Ruffcut (sawblade and log hazards)
US version timer reduction increases pressure across all levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Level structure organized by enemy/environment theme (land creatures → water creatures → aerial creatures), with unused assets suggesting each theme had deeper planned variety
Boss levels feature unique hazards (sawblades, falling logs) distinct from standard level obstacles, requiring adapted platforming strategy
All levels subject to countdown timer creating sustained tension; US localization intensified by halving available time from 5:00 to 3:00

sources_used: tcrf: Wacky Races (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor

extraction_notes.data_limitations: Source provides development/publishing metadata and unused asset inventory but lacks detailed level-by-level design documentation, enemy placement patterns, or explicit pacing rhythm measurements. Inferences drawn from enemy categorization in unused assets and timer differences between regions.
extraction_notes.confidence: low-to-moderate for sequencing specifics; confirmed for regional difficulty variance and thematic enemy grouping
